content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Feb 21, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
The day saw the proposal of two new plugins, `@elizaos/plugin-xproof` and `micronoise-eliza-plugin`, indicating active expansion of the ElizaOS plugin ecosystem. Discussions continued on the MoltBridge integration proposal.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

No completed work was reported for Feb 21, 2026.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
Two new pull requests were opened today, both proposing new plugin integrations:
- A new feature to add the `@elizaos/plugin-xproof` plugin was proposed in [#266](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/266).
- Another pull request, [#265](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/265), suggests adding the `micronoise-eliza-plugin` for token swaps via x402 payments.

## CLOSED ISSUES

No issues were closed today.

## NEW ISSUES

No new issues were reported today.

## ACTIVE ISSUES

### MoltBridge Integration Proposal Discussion
Discussion continued on the integration proposal for MoltBridge Trust & Discovery Layer as an ElizaOS Plugin [#6501](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/issues/6501). A recent update from JKHeadley confirmed that MoltBridge is live and available for integration, providing details on its API, Node SDK, MCP server, and A2A agent card. Specific benefits for Eliza agents were highlighted, including cryptographic identity registration, querying trust scores, and building reputation through attestations. The update also mentioned an onboarding program for founding agents and expressed interest in building an Eliza plugin.
